name: Allay Oval Pool Deck Plan - 6x8 Pool Deck for 15x30 Oval Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15x30 oval above-ground pools
Efficient 6x8 deck footprint - ideal for very small yards and compact spaces
Optimized walking clearance for safe and comfortable pool entry
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Simple, streamlined design - perfect for quick builds & minimal material cost
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with complete material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' x 30' oval above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Allay Oval Pool Deck Plan transforms your 15x30 above-ground oval pool into a smart, space-saving backyard upgrade. Featuring a compact 6x8 platform layout, this design delivers safe and convenient pool access while maintaining an ultra-efficient footprint - perfect for tight spaces, minimalist layouts, and budget-friendly DIY builds. Allay blends simplicity, safety, and modern outdoor style into one beautifully practical pool deck solution. Key Features
